13680894341.title: NEXUS 500/850ml Milk Plastic Cup Transparent with Lid Straw Water Straw Bottles Drinkware Leakproof Large Capacity Water Bottle Juice
13680894341.detail_text: Product: Sports water cup Capacity: 500/850ml Size:As Picture Packaging: 1pc sports water cup Material: PC Colors:pink/green/purple/white Plastic Heat resistance: 0~95°C Feature: 1. Food grade PC/Glass material, safe and non-toxic, BPA free. 2. Water leakage prevention design, 360° seal leakproof. 3. Transparent Cup body design, large capacity drinking water. 4. You can use it to drink bubble tea, boba tea, coffee, water, juice, milk and so on.
13680894341.detail_html:
Product: Sports water cup

Capacity: 500/850ml

Size:As Picture

Packaging: 1pc sports water cup

Material: PC

Colors:pink/green/purple/white

Plastic Heat resistance: 0~95°C


Feature:

1. Food grade PC/Glass material, safe and non-toxic, BPA free.

2. Water leakage prevention design, 360° seal leakproof.

3. Transparent Cup body design, large capacity drinking water.

4. You can use it to drink bubble tea, boba tea, coffee, water, juice, milk and so on.

941190806.detail_text: Features： Upgraded handle: new and improved ergonomic handle provides an effortless grip while maintaining its elegance and beauty. Stainless steel lasts longer: 100% copper mug will rust over time through oxidation of the metal. 18 OZ capacity: Our large-capacity copper mug works great for chilled beer, iced coffee, iced tea and any vodka, gin, rum, tequila, or whiskey mixed drinks.
